name: @pacaf/scripts
description: Helper scripts for Power Apps Code App projects: prototype seeding, auth setup, deployment safety, and migration tooling. Dataverse schema, data, solution, and export operations are owned by the Dataverse-skills plugin.

scripts.test: node --test tests/shell.test.mjs tests/connection-discovery.test.mjs tests/pac-target.test.mjs tests/routing-guard.test.mjs tests/deploy-step-parity.test.mjs tests/publisher-prefix-seeding.test.mjs
scripts.test:legacy: echo 'agent-guidance-drift, scaffold-prototype-path, and seed-prototype-assets tests need rewriting for the monorepo layout (paths to scripts/AGENTS.md, scripts/seed-prototype-assets.mjs, etc. are stale). See issue TBD.' && exit 1
